stages.concept:
# Unit 078: 동명사의 시제와 수동태 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **동명사의 시제와 수동태**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **단순 동명사** (-ing) — 주절과 같은 시제

> I enjoy **playing** tennis.
> 나는 테니스 치는 것을 즐긴다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **완료 동명사** (having + p.p.) — 주절 동사보다 **이전** 시제

> He denied **having stolen** the money.
> 그는 돈을 훔쳤다는 것을 부인했다.

> I regret **having said** those words.
> 나는 그 말을 했던 것을 후회한다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 형태를 고르세요.**
"He denied (          ) the money." (그는 돈을 훔쳤다는 것을 부인했다.)
1. stealing
2. having stolen ✅
3. being stolen

👩‍🏫 선생님: 부인한 것(denied)보다 돈을 훔친 것이 더 과거에 일어난 일이니까, 한 시제 앞선 '완료 동명사(having p.p.)'를 써야 한답니다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **수동 동명사** (being + p.p.) — ~되는 것

> She doesn't like **being called** by her nickname.
> 그녀는 별명으로 불리는 것을 좋아하지 않는다.

> He is afraid of **being punished**.
> 그는 벌 받는 것을 두려워한다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **완료 수동 동명사** (having been + p.p.) — ~되었던 것

> He is proud of **having been chosen** as the leader.
> 그는 리더로 뽑혔던 것을 자랑스러워한다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 동명사도 to부정사처럼 단순(-ing), 완료(having p.p.), 수동(being p.p.), 완료수동(having been p.p.) 4가지!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 078: 동명사의 시제와 수동태 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 보기 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He suggests that he makes trip plans.
→ He suggests (     ) trip plans.
> **정답** making

---

**02.** She is proud that she won the contest.
→ She is proud of (     ) the contest.
> **정답** having won

---

**03.** He doesn't like that he is scolded by the teacher.
→ He doesn't like (     ) by the teacher.
> **정답** being scolded

---

**04.** I remember that I visited that place before.
→ I remember (     ) that place before.
> **정답** having visited

---

**05.** She is afraid that she will be left alone.
→ She is afraid of (     ) alone.
> **정답** being left

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She is proud of have won the award.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** have → having

---

**07.** He remembers be praised by the teacher.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** be → being

---

**08.** I regret not have studied harder.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** have → having

---

**09.** She is afraid of be left alone.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** be → being

---

**10.** He denied have broken the window.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** have → having

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀는 상을 받은 것을 자랑스러워한다.
She is proud of the prize.
> **정답** having won

---

**12.** 그는 혼나는 것을 싫어한다.
He doesn't like .
> **정답** being scolded

---

**13.** 나는 더 열심히 공부하지 않은 것을 후회한다.
I regret harder.
> **정답** not having studied

---

**14.** 그녀는 혼자 남겨지는 것을 두려워한다.
She is afraid of alone.
> **정답** being left

---

**15.** 그는 유리창을 깬 것을 부인했다.
He denied the window.
> **정답** having broken

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 선생님에게 칭찬받는 것을 좋아한다.
She likes praised being by the teacher
> **정답** She / likes / being / praised / by / the / teacher

---

**17.** 그는 시험에 합격한 것을 자랑스러워한다.
is He proud of having passed the exam
> **정답** He / is / proud / of / having / passed / the / exam

---

**18.** 나는 거짓말한 것을 후회한다.
regret I having lied
> **정답** I / regret / having / lied

---

**19.** 그녀는 무시당하는 것을 싫어한다.
doesn't She like being ignored
> **정답** She / doesn't / like / being / ignored

---

**20.** 그는 약속을 어긴 것을 부인했다.
denied He having broken the promise
> **정답** He / denied / having / broken / the / promise
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 078: 동명사의 시제와 수동태 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She met Tom yesterday.
She is pleased about _______________ Tom
being met
having met
meeting
meet
> **정답** having met

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy won first prize.
Amy is very happy about ____________________ first
prize.
winning
win
having won
being won
> **정답** having won

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I hate ___________________ when I'm speaking.
interrupting
having interrupted
interrupt
being interrupted
• interrupt 방해하다
> **정답** being interrupted

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She got the job.
She is excited about ___________________ the job.
get
being gotten
having gotten
getting
> **정답** having gotten

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Happiness comes more from loving than __________.
being loved
be loved
having loved
loving
> **정답** being loved

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
He resents blaming even though he is
innocent.
She was very proud of being a mother.
I love meeting new people.
He denied having stolen the bike.
• resent 분하게 여기다
• blame ~을 탓하다
• innocent 결백한
> **정답** He resents blaming even though he is innocent.

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
The boy is ashamed of having been scolded.
She enjoys treating as a special guest.
He likes being asked to give a lecture.
He is proud of having won the prize.
> **정답** She enjoys treating as a special guest.

---

**08.** 두 문장의 뜻을 같게 할 때 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I imagine that I will be president.
I imagine being elected president.
He doesn't tell the truth.
I am angry at him for not telling the truth.
Someone gave money to the mayor.
The mayor admits having been given the
money.
I do not criticize people.
I hate being criticized.
> **정답** I do not criticize people. I hate being criticized.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
All members in the club insisted on helping
children in the country.
He is proud of being treated as a member of
the club.
She is worried about being gotten a bad
grade.
How could the thief get away without being
caught?
> **정답** She is worried about being gotten a bad grade.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
Nobody likes having treated as a loser.
I don't enjoy being laughed at by other
people.
Famous people get tired of being recognized
everywhere they go.
Mr. Kim mentioned having been injured in
the accident as a child.
> **정답** Nobody likes having treated as a loser.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 그가 실수를 했다는 것을 인정한다.
He admits making a mistake.
He admits having made a mistake.
He admits having been made a mistake.
He admits being made a mistake.
> **정답** He admits having made a mistake.

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 국가대표팀의 일원이었던 것을 자랑스러워한다.
He is proud of having be a member of the
national team.
He is proud of be a member of the national
team.
He is proud of being a member of the national
team.
He is proud of having been a member of the
national team.
> **정답** He is proud of having been a member of the national team.

---

**13.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 그 여자를 만난 적이 있었다는 것을 부인했다.
He denied having met the woman.
He denied being met the woman.
He denied meeting the woman.
He denied have met the woman.
> **정답** He denied having met the woman.

---

**14.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이사회에 임명되는 것은 큰 부담이다.
Having appointed to the board of directors is
a great responsibility.
Being appointed to the board of directors is a
great responsibility.
Having been appointed to the board of
directors is a great responsibility.
Appointing to the board of directors is a great
responsibility.
> **정답** Being appointed to the board of directors is a great responsibility.

---

**15.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
금고는 손을 댄 흔적이 전혀 없었다.
The safe showed no signs of having touched.
The safe showed no signs of having been
touched.
The safe showed no signs of being touched.
The safe showed no signs of touching.
> **정답** The safe showed no signs of having been touched.

---

**16.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
저는 창문을 깨뜨렸던 것에 대해 사과드립니다.
I apologize for breaking the window.
→ I apologize for the window.
> **정답** having broken

---

**17.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
그녀는 선물을 받는 것에 익숙했다.
She was used to giving presents.
→ She was used to presents.
> **정답** being given

---

**18.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
그는 그곳에 가 본 적이 없다고 부인하고 있다.
He denies being there.
→He denies there.
> **정답** having been

---

**19.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
그는 다른 사람들에게 무시당하는 것을 좋아하지 않는다.
He doesn't like ignoring by others.
→ He doesn't like by others.
> **정답** being ignored

---

**20.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
Tom은 파리에 있을 때 그를 도와주었던 것에 대해 그들에
게 감사한다.
Tom thanks them for helping him when he was in
Paris.
→ He thanks them for him when
he was in Paris..
> **정답** having helped
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 078 동명사의 시제와 수동태중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 문장을 완성하시오.
He is proud that he won the gold medal.
해설:  He is proud of
.
정답 having won the gold medal

---

**02.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 문장을 완성하시오.
She was sure that she had seen the man before.
해설:  She was sure of
 before.
정답 having seen the man

---

**03.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 문장을 완성하시오.
Sally likes that she is treated as a special guest.
해설:  She likes 
.
정답 being treated as a special guest

---

**04.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 문장을 완성하시오.
I can't stand that I am told what to do.
→ I can't stand  (     ) .
정답 being told what to do

---

**05.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 범죄를 저질렀다는 것에 대해 부끄러움을 느낀다.
힌트 (     ) commit, a crime
He is ashamed of  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 having, committed, a, crime

---

**06.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 그 돈을 훔쳤다는 것을 인정했다.
힌트 (     ) steal, the money
He admitted  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 having, stolen, the, money

---

**07.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오
나는 들은 것을 확실히 기억하지 못한다.
힌트 (     ) remember, tell
I certainly can't  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 remember, being, told

---

**08.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오
나는 할로윈에 사탕을 받는 게 너무 좋다.
힌트 (     ) give, candy
I love  (     )   (     )   (     )  on Halloween
정답 being, given, candy

---

**09.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 알맞게
배열하시오.
그는 실수를 했다는 것을 인정했다.
[made] [admitted] [He]
[having] [the mistake.]
정답 He / admitted / having / made / the mistake.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 알맞게
배열하시오.
나는 그가 병원으로 이송되는 것을 보았다.
[to] [him] [taken] [being]
[hospital.] [saw] (     ) I
정답 I / saw / him / being / taken / to / hospital.

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 078: 동명사의 시제와 수동태 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She met Tom yesterday.
She is pleased about _______________ Tom being met having met meeting meet
> 정답: having met

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy won first prize.
Amy is very happy about ____________________ first prize. winning win having won being won
> 정답: having won

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I hate ___________________ when I'm presenting.
interrupting having interrupted interrupt being interrupted
> 정답: being interrupted

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She got the award.
She is excited about ___________________ the award. get being gotten having gotten getting
> 정답: having gotten

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Happiness comes more from caring than __________. being cared for be cared for having cared caring
> 정답: being cared for

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
He resents blaming even though he is not guilty.
She was very proud of being a class leader.
I love meeting new classmates.
He denied having stolen the pen.
> 정답: He resents blaming even though he is not guilty.

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
The boy is ashamed of having been scolded.
She enjoys treating as a special guest.
He likes being asked to give a talk.
He is proud of having won the medal.
> 정답: She enjoys treating as a special guest.

---

**08.** 두 문장의 뜻을 같게 할 때 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I imagine that I will be captain.
I imagine being chosen captain.
He doesn't tell the truth.
I am angry at him for not telling the truth.
Someone gave a gift to the teacher.
The teacher admits having been given the gift.
I do not judge people.
I hate being judged.
> 정답: I do not judge people. I hate being judged.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
All members in the group insisted on helping students in the village.
He is proud of being treated as a member of the team.
She is worried about being gotten a low score.
How could the thief get away without being caught?
> 정답: She is worried about being gotten a low score.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
Nobody likes having treated as a loser.
I don't enjoy being laughed at by other students.
Famous people get tired of being recognized everywhere they go.
Mr. Park mentioned having been injured in the accident as a child.
> 정답: Nobody likes having treated as a loser.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 그가 실수를 했다는 것을 인정한다.
He admits making an error.
He admits having made an error.
He admits having been made an error.
He admits being made an error.
> 정답: He admits having made an error.

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 학교 대표팀의 일원이었던 것을 자랑스러워한다.
He is proud of having be a member of the school team.
He is proud of be a member of the school team.
He is proud of being a member of the school team.
He is proud of having been a member of the school team.
> 정답: He is proud of having been a member of the school

---

**13.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 그 소녀를 만난 적이 있었다는 것을 부인했다.
He denied having met the girl.
He denied being met the girl.
He denied meeting the girl.
He denied have met the girl.
> 정답: He denied having met the girl.

---

**14.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
반장으로 임명되는 것은 큰 책임이다.
Having appointed as a class leader is a great responsibility.
Being appointed as a class leader is a great responsibility.
Having been appointed as a class leader is a great responsibility.
Appointing as a class leader is a great responsibility.
> 정답: Being appointed as a class leader is a great

---

**15.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
사물함은 손을 댄 흔적이 전혀 없었다.
The locker showed no signs of having touched.
The locker showed no signs of having been touched.
The locker showed no signs of being touched.
The locker showed no signs of touching.
> 정답: The locker showed no signs of having been touched.

---

**16.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
저는 꽃병을 깨뜨렸던 것에 대해 사과드립니다.
I apologize for breaking the vase. → I apologize for the vase.
> 정답: having broken

---

**17.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
그녀는 칭찬을 받는 것에 익숙했다.
She was used to giving compliments. → She was used to compliments.
> 정답: being given

---

**18.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
그는 그곳에 가 본 적이 없다고 부인하고 있다.
He denies being there. →He denies there.
> 정답: having been

---

**19.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
그는 다른 사람들에게 무시당하는 것을 좋아하지 않는다.
He doesn't like ignoring by others. → He doesn't like by others.
> 정답: being ignored

**20.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
Tom은 런던에 있을 때 그를 도와주었던 것에 대해 그들에 게 감사한다.
Tom thanks them for helping him when he was in London. → He thanks them for him when he was in London..
> 정답: having helped
